data.title: Muzero Acquisition Corp prices its IPO at $175 million, offering 17.5 million units at $10 each, to trade on Nasdaq on Jan 30.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, a newly established special purpose acquisition company, Muzero Acquisition Corp, disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering. The company offered 17,500,000 units at $10.00 per unit, each unit comprising one Class A ordinary share and half of one redeemable warrant. Holders of whole warrants can purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50. Trading of units under the ticker symbol "MUZEU" on the Global Market tier of Nasdaq will commence on January 30, 2026. Following unit separation, full warrants will be tradable, with ordinary shares under "MUZE" and warrants under "MUZEW" on Nasdaq. No fractional warrants will be issued or traded.

data.title: Johnson Outdoors Inc. to hold virtual Annual Shareholders Meeting on Feb. 26, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CST. Shareholders of record as of Dec. 18, 2025, can attend, vote, and submit questions. Visit www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/JOUT2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Johnson Outdoors Inc. will host its Annual Shareholders meeting on February 26, 2026, starting at 8:00 a.m. CST. The event will be held virtually. Shareholders who held shares as of December 18, 2025, are eligible to participate, vote, and ask questions during the live webcast by accessing www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/JOUT2026 and entering their unique 16-digit control number found on their Notice of Annual Meeting or Proxy Card. Johnson Outdoors Inc. is known for its outdoor recreation equipment and technology and is listed on Nasdaq as JOUT.
